news.title:
Sagility Ltd announced the appointment of Srinivas Rathnam Mattapalli as Group CFO, effective February 14, 2026.
Srinivas, an IIM Bangalore alumnus, has 30+ years in finance, with leadership roles at Genpact, eFunds, and Coca-Cola.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd announced the appointment of Srinivas Rathnam Mattapalli as Group CFO, effective February 14, 2026.
Srinivas, an IIM Bangalore alumnus, has 30+ years in finance, with leadership roles at Genpact, eFunds, and Coca-Cola.

news.title:
Sagility Ltd reported strong Q3 FY26 results with revenue at ₹19,712M, up 35.7% YoY, and EBITDA margins at 26%. Medicare AEP season drove exceptional performance.
The company increased FY26 revenue growth guidance to 22.5% in constant currency. Focus remains on expanding clinical operations and managed services while reducing debt by FY27.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd reported strong Q3 FY26 results with revenue at ₹19,712M, up 35.7% YoY, and EBITDA margins at 26%. Medicare AEP season drove exceptional performance.
The company increased FY26 revenue growth guidance to 22.5% in constant currency. Focus remains on expanding clinical operations and managed services while reducing debt by FY27.

news.title:
Sagility Ltd disclosed the video recording of its investor webinar discussing Q3 FY25 results.
The recording is available on Sagility's website under the investor relations section.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd disclosed the video recording of its investor webinar discussing Q3 FY25 results.
The recording is available on Sagility's website under the investor relations section.

news.title:
Sagility Ltd's Q3 FY25 revenue stood at Rs 19,712M with PBT of Rs 3,385M.
A one-time Rs 328M impact from Labour Codes and BroadPath acquisition for $55.7M noted.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd's Q3 FY25 revenue stood at Rs 19,712M with PBT of Rs 3,385M.
A one-time Rs 328M impact from Labour Codes and BroadPath acquisition for $55.7M noted.

news.title:
Sagility Ltd will host an earnings webinar on Jan 28, 2026, at 7:30 PM IST to discuss Q3 FY26 financial results.
The session includes management commentary, operational highlights, and a Q&A with CEO Ramesh Gopalan and CFO Abhishek Kayan.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd will host an earnings webinar on Jan 28, 2026, at 7:30 PM IST to discuss Q3 FY26 financial results.
The session includes management commentary, operational highlights, and a Q&A with CEO Ramesh Gopalan and CFO Abhishek Kayan.

news.title:
Sagility Ltd has been assigned a long-term rating of 'Crisil A/Stable' and short-term rating of 'Crisil A1' by CRISIL.
The ratings apply to the company's Rs. 300 crore bank loan facilities, as per SEBI Regulation 30.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd has been assigned a long-term rating of 'Crisil A/Stable' and short-term rating of 'Crisil A1' by CRISIL.
The ratings apply to the company's Rs. 300 crore bank loan facilities, as per SEBI Regulation 30.

news.title:
Sagility Ltd completed redemption of 1,105 unsecured, unlisted debentures, totaling ₹110.5 crore.
Interest of ₹2.1 crore at 8% p.a. paid for Oct 2025 to Jan 2026.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd completed redemption of 1,105 unsecured, unlisted debentures, totaling ₹110.5 crore.
Interest of ₹2.1 crore at 8% p.a. paid for Oct 2025 to Jan 2026.

news.title:
Sagility Ltd reported Q2FY26 revenue of ₹16,585M and PBT of ₹3,288M.
The company declared an interim dividend of ₹0.05/share; no changes in prior filings.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd reported Q2FY26 revenue of ₹16,585M and PBT of ₹3,288M.
The company declared an interim dividend of ₹0.05/share; no changes in prior filings.

news.title:
Sagility Ltd announces resignation of Chief Growth Officer Sohail Djariri, effective Nov 28, 2025.
Board appoints Chris Shiffert as new Chief Growth Officer, effective Dec 1, 2025.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd announces resignation of Chief Growth Officer Sohail Djariri, effective Nov 28, 2025.
Board appoints Chris Shiffert as new Chief Growth Officer, effective Dec 1, 2025.

news.title:
Sagility B.V., promoter of Sagility Ltd, disclosed disposal of equity shares under SEBI Takeover Regulations.
Sagility B.V.'s shareholding reduced from 67.4% to 50.9% after selling 16.4% via open market on Nov 17, 2025.
news.summary:
Sagility B.V., promoter of Sagility Ltd, disclosed disposal of equity shares under SEBI Takeover Regulations.
Sagility B.V.'s shareholding reduced from 67.4% to 50.9% after selling 16.4% via open market on Nov 17, 2025.

news.title:
Sagility Ltd will participate in JM Financial and Kotak Midcap conferences in Mumbai on Nov 20-21, 2025.
Company will discuss industry and public developments without sharing unpublished price-sensitive info.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd will participate in JM Financial and Kotak Midcap conferences in Mumbai on Nov 20-21, 2025.
Company will discuss industry and public developments without sharing unpublished price-sensitive info.

news.title:
Sagility promoter divests 16.4% stake; Unifi Capital acquires nearly 5% for ₹1,050 crore.
Societe General purchases 1.8% stake in Sagility for ₹404 crore.
news.summary:
Sagility promoter divests 16.4% stake; Unifi Capital acquires nearly 5% for ₹1,050 crore.
Societe General purchases 1.8% stake in Sagility for ₹404 crore.

news.title:
Sagility gains 6% post a block deal involving 17% equity.
GMDC drops 4% as revenue declines and EBITDA halves.
news.summary:
Sagility gains 6% post a block deal involving 17% equity.
GMDC drops 4% as revenue declines and EBITDA halves.

news.title: Sagility witnessed a block deal of 69.2 crore shares, representing 17% equity.
news.summary: Sagility witnessed a block deal of 69.2 crore shares, representing 17% equity.

news.title:
Sagility promoters may sell up to 16.4% stake via block deals.
The floor price set is Rs 46.4/share, an 8% discount to CMP.
news.summary:
Sagility promoters may sell up to 16.4% stake via block deals.
The floor price set is Rs 46.4/share, an 8% discount to CMP.

news.title:
Sagility Ltd announces resignation of Group CFO, Mr. Srinivasan, effective Nov 15, 2025, citing personal reasons.
Board approves Mr. Abhishek Kayan as Deputy CFO, effective Nov 15, 2025; he holds 20 years of finance experience.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd announces resignation of Group CFO, Mr. Srinivasan, effective Nov 15, 2025, citing personal reasons.
Board approves Mr. Abhishek Kayan as Deputy CFO, effective Nov 15, 2025; he holds 20 years of finance experience.

news.title: Sagility shares climb 8% after posting strong Q2 results.
news.summary: Sagility shares climb 8% after posting strong Q2 results.

news.title:
Sagility India secures $34M ACV wins, driving FY26 momentum.
Focus on automation, analytics, and healthcare outsourcing boosts EBITDA growth.
news.summary:
Sagility India secures $34M ACV wins, driving FY26 momentum.
Focus on automation, analytics, and healthcare outsourcing boosts EBITDA growth.

news.title:
Sagility Ltd declares Rs. 0.05 interim dividend for FY 2025-26, based on Rs. 10 face value.
Record date is Nov 12, 2025; dividend payable by Nov 28, 2025.
news.summary:
Sagility Ltd declares Rs. 0.05 interim dividend for FY 2025-26, based on Rs. 10 face value.
Record date is Nov 12, 2025; dividend payable by Nov 28, 2025.

news.title:
Sagility India's Q2 net profit rose to ₹2.51B from ₹1.17B YOY.
Q2 revenue grew to ₹16.58B, EBITDA rose to ₹4.15B, margin at 25.03% YOY.
news.summary:
Sagility India's Q2 net profit rose to ₹2.51B from ₹1.17B YOY.
Q2 revenue grew to ₹16.58B, EBITDA rose to ₹4.15B, margin at 25.03% YOY.
